positive: A stylized, minimalist celestial forest scene. Glowing, bioluminescent fauna and flora populate the scene. Dominant elements include stylized moons, glowing geometric constellations, and highly detailed, whimsical forest creatures (e.g., fox-like figures with glowing tips, stylized mushrooms). The composition should feature strong, central silhouettes against a deeply contrasting twilight sky background. Use a palette of deep indigo, teal, metallic gold, and luminous aqua. The style is a fusion of Art Nouveau etching and modern vector graphic aesthetics. Ensure clean lines, high contrast, and symmetry for perfect apparel printing. No visible text or harsh gradients.
negative: blurry, artifacts, low resolution, extra limbs, bad anatomy, text, signature, watermark, logos, trademarks, copyrighted characters, messy, clutter, low detail, noisy
